commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=44f1167fa0f2884f869245948fd26f982130a21d)
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates `writeUsageCostCacheLockAtomically` to reuse the lock payload and fall back to `fs.promises.writeFile(lockPath, payload, { flag: "wx" })` when `fs.promises.link()` fails with `ENOTSUP`.

PR surface: Source +11. Total +11 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main publishes `.usage-cost-cache.json.lock` with `fs.promises.link`, and `acquireUsageCostCacheRefreshLock` only handles `EEXIST`, so an unsupported-link errno from the reported mount class escapes refresh. I did not run a live SMB/NFS/virtiofs mount repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This needs contributor or maintainer follow-up rather than a ClawSweeper repair lane because the proof gate requires a real unsupported-hardlink environment or explicit maintainer override.

target.title: fix(infra): fall back to exclusive create when hard links are unsupported
target.author: dwc1997
